song_name: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go

Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go
Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go
versions.version_description: Complete version of this Wham number one record from 1984,play with Clean electric guitar with reverb and chorus effects or simply acoustic guitar.You Tube link https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pIgZ7gMze7A.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

recommended.song_name: I Just Called To Say I Love You

content:
Wham! - Wake me up before you go go

[Intro]
2x [ch]C[/ch]-[ch]Am[/ch]-[ch]F[/ch]-[ch]Am[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
You put the boom boom into my heart [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                  
you send my soul sky high when your loving starts [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
a jitterbug into my brain [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]  
goes a bang bang bang till my feet do the same[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
But something's bugging you something ain't right [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] 
my best friend told me what you did last night [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
you left me sleeping in my bed I was dreaming [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch](barré)
but I should have been with you instead[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Wake me up before you go go [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]    
don't leave me hanging on like a jo-jo [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
wake me up before you go go [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]     
I don't wanna miss it when you hit that high [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
wake me up before you go go [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch] 
'cause I'm not planing on going solo [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
wake me up before you go go ah [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  
take me dancing tonight [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   
I wanna hit that high yea yea[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]Am[/ch]
You take the grey skies out of my way [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                  
you make the sun shine brighter than Doris Day [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
turned a bright spark into a flame [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]              
my beats per minute never been the same[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
'cause you're my lady I'm your fool [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch] 
it makes me crazy when you act so cruel [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
come on baby let's not fight [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch](barré)
we'll go dancing everything will be alright[/tab]
